name: Durgo Rawhoshyo
overview: Seeds of crime, ploys of destruction, and legends of a hidden treasure lurk in an erstwhile royal fort of Jankigarh. Shotyaneshi Byomkesh Bakshi returns, along with Ajit and Satyabati, to unravel the mysteries in the dark hallways of the mysterious fortress.

trailers.title: Official Trailer - Durgo Rawhoshyo | Anirban, Sohini | Srijit Mukherji | 19th Oct | hoichoi
